Integrated features provide a real-time view of product availability, stock levels across warehouses, and stock transfers. 8:["$","$L4","Automated Accounting5",{"heading":"Automated Accounting","body":"Our pharmacy ERP software is supported by a comprehensive international standard accounting system, ensuring full compliance with IFRS standards. The system automates ledger entries, minimizing manual data entry and enhancing accuracy. Key features include a detailed Chart of Accounts, management of Opening Account Balances, Taxes, Advance Payments, Budgeting, and Subscription Management. It also provides automatic VAT calculations and generates VAT reports in line with local taxation laws. You can drill down Profit and Loss and Balance Sheet reports by branch, while Accounts Payable and Receivable reports help manage cash flow effectively. The software also offers concise credit facilities per supplier and precise item valuation, including all indirect costs, to accurately assess profitability per item.","imageAlt":"Automated Accounting","reversed":true}]

Our POS module features a clear, intuitive interface with easy search capabilities and a single checkout screen for efficient sales transactions and commonly used tasks. Compatible with any device, our user-friendly POS software is highly flexible and fully integrated with your inventory for real-time retail management.
